title: The Final Edit
opening_incident: Eleanor Finch was found beside her desk, the lamp sitting crookedly and the monitor displaying an unfinished financial report.
motive: Eleanor had discovered financial fraud that would expose the killer.
method: The killer used the desk lamp's cord to strangle Eleanor before replacing the lamp on the desk.
killer_alibi: I left the room at 20:00 and did not return.
killer_alibi_flaw: The monitor's visible revision history shows the speaker's local account made a keyboard edit at 20:13, proving they were at the desk after 20:00.
